summary: A high‑quality audience tape that captures a killer The Other One solo and the rare electric Deep Elm performance.
review: This audience recording is praised as one of the better crowd tapes, even good enough to serve as a matrix source with a soundboard track. Fans rave about the unforgettable The Other One solo and the seldom‑heard electric Deep Elm, while Bob Weir’s humorous opening banter adds extra charm.

ai_rating.rationale: The single detailed 5‑star review highlights both an excellent performance (standout songs, rare material) and a strong audience recording, meriting a high rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as one of the better audience recordings; reviewer suggests it would work well in a matrix mix with a soundboard source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Insufficient information about overall set structure; focus is on highlighted songs.

band_member_comments.Bob: Bobby's opening statement is noted as hilarious, adding a fun moment to the show.
